subtasks.step: Find your gardening gloves and put them on.
Grab one trash bag and walk through the garden, picking up only the obvious litter (papers, plastic bottles, large fallen leaves) you can easily reach.
Pick a 2x2 foot section of a garden bed and pull out all the weeds you can see within that small area.
Grab a rake and rake up a small pile of debris (leaves, small sticks) from one designated path or corner of the garden.
Empty the trash bag you filled into your main bin, then put away your gloves and rake.
